description: woodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Stylishly eclectic overlays on the woodsy upper adds an aesthetic referenced from the outdoors. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. A cheeky take on the classic boat shoe (as seen with its detailing) this two-hole lace up leather shoe also references the conservative penny loafer with its silhouette. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt. Upper Two-tone textured upper with overlays Three-hole central lace ups with D-ring metal eyelets Padded tongue Padded insole for in-step comfort Midsole Rubber midsole for cushioned comfort Outsole Dual density TPU outsole with a curved midfoot Geometric lugs on the heel Outsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard and toe guard, with branding Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
